test.create_query: CREATE TABLE dict_src_const_path ( id UInt64, value UInt32, value_str String ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO dict_src_const_path SELECT number AS id, (number % 10000) AS value, concat('value_', toString(number % 10000)) AS value_str FROM numbers(10000000);
CREATE DICTIONARY dict_const_path ( id UInt64, value UInt32, value_str String ) PRIMARY KEY id SOURCE(CLICKHOUSE(TABLE 'dict_src_const_path')) LIFETIME(0) LAYOUT(HASHED());
test.query: SELECT groupArray(id) FROM dict_src_const_path WHERE dictGetUInt32('dict_const_path', 'value', id) = 1 FORMAT NULL;
SELECT groupArray(id) FROM dict_src_const_path WHERE dictGetString('dict_const_path', 'value_str', id) = 'value_1' FORMAT NULL;
